flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Orangeburg Calhoun Technical College fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (15.7% → 11.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Orangeburg Calhoun Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Orangeburg Calhoun Technical College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Orangeburg Calhoun Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).
